query: Compose an email to client@example.com with subject "Q4 report", a short body, and attach /home/me/reports/q4.pdf. I want to send it from a script (non-interactive).
expected_behavior: use `himalaya template send` with stdin (heredoc), NOT the interactive `message write`
include MML `<#part filename=/home/me/reports/q4.pdf><#/part>` to attach the file
cross-link or reference `reference/composing-messages.md` for the MML detail
include the `From:` header in the heredoc
notes: Guards two things: (1) the non-interactive path is `template send` (not `message write`), and (2) MML attachment syntax is findable from SKILL.md via the composing-messages cross-link.
